concepts.title: Convolution operation and receptive fields
concepts.hook: Spatial locality and weight sharing; receptive field determines what context layer sees.

concepts.title: Pooling and spatial downsampling
concepts.hook: Max pooling vs average pooling; destroys some spatial structure.

concepts.title: Common architectures (ResNet, VGG, Inception)
concepts.hook: ResNets' skip connections enable deep training; understand motivation.

concepts.title: Transfer learning and fine-tuning
concepts.hook: Pre-trained weights accelerate learning; layer freezing vs full fine-tune tradeoff.

concepts.title: 1x1 convolutions and depthwise separable convolutions
concepts.hook: Dimensionality reduction and efficient mobile networks.

concepts.title: Normalization layers (BatchNorm, LayerNorm, GroupNorm, InstanceNorm)
concepts.hook: Different norms suit different scenarios; LayerNorm better for RNNs and transformers.

concepts.title: RNN fundamentals and backprop through time (BPTT)
concepts.hook: Unroll over time; gradients flow backward through sequences.

concepts.title: Vanishing/exploding gradient problem
concepts.hook: BPTT gradient magnitude shrinks or explodes with sequence length.

concepts.title: LSTM and GRU gates
concepts.hook: Gate mechanisms solve gradient flow; forget gate prevents vanishing, input gate selective updates.

concepts.title: Bidirectional RNNs
concepts.hook: Condition on future context; why unidirectional for language modeling.

concepts.title: Sequence-to-sequence and attention
concepts.hook: Encoder-decoder for variable-length outputs; attention learns alignment.

concepts.title: Scaled dot-product attention
concepts.hook: Why scaling by sqrt(d): stabilizes gradients; prevents softmax saturation.

concepts.title: Multi-head attention
concepts.hook: Different representation subspaces; interpretable as different "roles" or query types.

concepts.title: Positional encodings and rotary position embeddings (RoPE)
concepts.hook: Transformers are permutation-invariant; add position info; RoPE scales to longer sequences.

concepts.title: Self-attention and its computational complexity
concepts.hook: O(n^2) complexity; critical bottleneck for long sequences.

concepts.title: Causality and causal masking
concepts.hook: Language models mask future tokens; enables autoregressive generation.

concepts.title: Layer normalization placement and residual connections
concepts.hook: Pre-LN vs post-LN; architectures differ in stability.

concepts.title: Vision transformers (ViT)
concepts.hook: Patch embedding + transformer encoder; matches CNNs with more compute.

concepts.title: Autoencoders and VAE
concepts.hook: Unsupervised dimensionality reduction; VAE adds probabilistic interpretation.

concepts.title: Diffusion models (forward and reverse process)
concepts.hook: Iterative denoising; state-of-the-art for image generation.

concepts.title: Denoising score matching
concepts.hook: Learn score function for reverse diffusion; enables stable training.

concepts.title: GANs (discriminator, generator, adversarial loss)
concepts.hook: Generator fooling discriminator; notoriously unstable.

concepts.title: Wasserstein GAN and gradient penalty
concepts.hook: Improves training stability; addresses mode collapse.
